song.title: Jesus Lives
song.author: Kelly Scaletta
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics: [V1] . G Whene’er I start to wander, . C It is then I stop to ponder, . G D D7 Jesus lives! Within me Jesus lives! . G C And then to Him returning, . G There’s a lesson I am learning, . C D7 Jesus lives! And I’m finding now . G His life to me He gives! [C] . G Sometimes I try and I succeed. . C Sometimes I try in vain. . D D7 Jesus lives! Within me Jesus lives! . G C Whate’er the case, my only need . G Is simply to enjoy Him. . C D7 Jesus lives! And I’m finding now . G C G His life to me He gives! [V2] At times when I am failing There’s a life within me swelling, Jesus lives! Within me Jesus lives! My failures aren’t availing ‘Cause His life in me’s prevailing. Jesus lives! And I’m finding now His life to me He gives! --- [V3] While trying and succeeding All my joy it is receding. Jesus lives! Within me Jesus lives! I find it’s not by trying, But by Jesus satisfying, Jesus lives! And I’m finding now His life to me He gives! [V4] No matter what I’m doing There’s a life within me proving Jesus lives! Within me Jesus lives! I’ve found there’s no denying That His life is so supplying. Jesus lives! And I’m finding now His life to me He gives!
